Hero.titleSecond: in one tool, on your infrastructure.
Hero.subtitle: Nalu AI shows you what to produce and purchase — and who's going to buy it. All on your server, live in 4 – 6 weeks.
Hero.trustHeading: Trusted by mid-market companies in DACH

erp.title: Mis-postings in SAP R/3
erp.body: Wrong goods receipts, phantom inventory, inconsistent master data — the reality of every mid-market ERP system.

excel.title: Excel forecasts go stale in hours
excel.body: Manual upkeep, copy-pasted formulas, version chaos. What's right on Monday is wrong by Tuesday.

ml.title: No in-house ML expertise
ml.body: Enterprise tools cost €200k+ per year or require a full data team. Both are rarely realistic.

Solution.title: Demand Intelligence.
Solution.subtitle: One platform for forecasting, analytics and supply chain — on your server, in your language, for your data.

forecasting.title: Forecasting
forecasting.body: ML models that understand your SAP data — not generic templates.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Sales, revenue, ABC/XYZ — all in one dashboard.

scm.title: SCM
scm.body: Safety stock, reorder points, inventory coverage — automatically.

connector.title: Set up the connector
connector.body: SAP R/3, CSV, REST API — we build the link to your system. Read-only, no changes to your ERP.

config.title: Configure the model
config.body: A single config.yaml with your columns, thresholds, seasonalities. We train on your data — not on a generic template.

live.title: Forecasts run automatically
live.body: Weekly retraining, automatic reports, alerts on critical stock levels. Your data never leaves your server.

callout.title: Your data stays with you — always.
callout.body: Nalu AI runs entirely on your infrastructure. No cloud dependency, no data sharing, no hidden APIs. GDPR-compliant by design.

Features.title: One tool for purchasing, planning and sales.
Features.subtitle: Forecasting, SCM and sales intelligence in one platform — everything included, no module shuffle.

forecasting.title: ML that understands your data.
forecasting.body: LightGBM and Temporal Fusion Transformer — trained on your SKUs, your seasonalities, your ERP quirks. No generic templates.
forecasting.bullet1: Cold-start for new SKUs without history
forecasting.bullet2: Confidence intervals per forecast (P10 / P50 / P90)
forecasting.bullet3: SHAP explanations: why does the model say that?

segmentation.title: Know which SKUs matter.
segmentation.body: ABC/XYZ classification, historical sales and revenue analysis, drill-down on segments, regions, product groups — all in one dashboard.
segmentation.bullet1: ABC by revenue or margin — automatic
segmentation.bullet2: XYZ variability on a weekly basis

scm.title: No more SKUs below reorder point.
scm.body: Safety stock and reorder points are calculated from forecast and service level. Severity-tagged alerts the moment an SKU becomes critical.
scm.bullet1: Safety stock at a chosen service level (e.g. 95%)
scm.bullet2: Reorder alerts with severity (critical / warning / info)
scm.bullet3: Coverage days per SKU at a glance
scm.bullet4: Optional: push to Slack, Teams or email

sales.title: Who buys, when and what next.
sales.body: Customer overview, purchase probability, churn detection and next best product — automatically available as soon as customer data is in your ERP.
sales.bullet2: Churn early warning on behavioral changes
sales.bullet4: Revenue forecasting at the customer level

reportsCallout.title: Every Monday at 6 a.m.:
reportsCallout.body: Nalu AI automatically generates PDF reports — KPIs, charts, AI narrative in your language. Local, on your server, no data in the cloud.

askNaluCallout.title: Ask your
askNaluCallout.body: Nalu AI answers questions about inventory, forecasts and revenue — in natural language, in your language, based on your real data. Local on your server, no internet access.
askNaluCallout.question: > What should I order today?
askNaluCallout.answer: 6 SKUs are critically below reorder point. Most urgent: IPA Craft (covers 2 days), Cola Classic (covers 3 days).

About.metaDescription: Nalu AI grew out of real production experience — not a hackathon.
About.headerTitle: Built by someone who knows the problem.
About.headerSubtitle: Nalu AI grew out of real production experience — not a hackathon.
About.story1: Before Nalu AI existed, I built an ML forecasting platform for a mid-market food producer — three years of development, production, iteration. No lab, no demo: daily forecasts that actually drove order quantities and service levels.
About.story2: In that time I learned where standard solutions fail. SAP R/3 postings that don't add up. Cold-start problems on newly listed SKUs. Excel forecasts that go stale at midnight when goods receipts roll in. ML models that shine in the lab and crumble in production because nobody minded the data quality.
About.story3: Nalu AI is the answer to that experience — not a reinvention. What works stays: LightGBM, Temporal Fusion Transformer, SHAP explanations, confidence intervals. What actually matters in mid-market gets added: on-premise deployment, deterministic pipelines, training instead of black box, maintenance as an integral part — not an upcharge.
About.story4Pre: The platform is configuration-driven. A new customer means one
About.story4Post: and a connector. No core changes. That's how it was designed, because that's how mid-market companies have to be served: without you having to become someone you're not.

data.title: Your data stays with you
data.body: No cloud dependency, no subprocessor chain. We build software for your infrastructure, not for ours.

noHype.title: No hype, just results
noHype.body: We don't talk about „AI-powered synergies.“ We deliver forecasts, alerts and reports your team can use tomorrow.

mittelstand.title: Mid-market understands mid-market
mittelstand.body: We know the reality: tight resources, legacy systems, pragmatic decisions. The product is built around that.

agent.title: Just ask.
agent.subtitle: Nalu AI answers your questions about inventory, forecasts and revenue — in natural language, in your language, based on your real data.
agent.ex1A: 6 SKUs are critical. Most urgent: IPA Craft Series (stock 54, ROP 238 — 2 days left), Cola Classic (3 days left).
agent.ex2Q: Why is the forecast for Nordpils so high?
agent.ex2A: Week 23 is historically the strongest grilling week — +47% vs. the 3-year annual average.
agent.ex3Q: Which SKUs have poor forecast accuracy?
agent.ex3A: 3 SKUs with MAPE > 15%: Aperitif Bitter (22.3%), Berry Splash (18.1%), Tomato juice (16.4%).
agent.calloutBody: The Ask Nalu agent runs locally on Ollama — no internet access, all data stays on your server.

custom.footer: Day rate: €1,200. Minimum: 3 days. Built, tested, and preserved through every Nalu AI update.

social.title: What our customers say.
social.note: Your savings depend on your situation — SKU count, ERP complexity, sales volume. We work it out with you.

individual.title: No package fits?
individual.subtitle: Nalu AI is fully configurable. We'll put together an offer that matches your requirements and your budget.

items.q: Why is there no fixed price?
items.a: Every implementation is individual — the complexity of your ERP data, your SKU count and the number of locations drive the effort. The tier prices are list prices; in conversation we'll prepare a binding quote.

items.q: What sets the three tiers apart?
items.a: In substance, nothing — every tier includes every feature. The differences are SKU count, the forecasting model used (Starter: LightGBM, Growth/Scale: LightGBM + TFT) and the support level. As your assortment grows, you simply switch tiers.

As soon as customer data (customer_id) is in your ERP — automatically. No license gate, just a data requirement. Without customer_id those pages would be empty and confusing, so we only show them when data exists.

items.q: What's included in the monthly license?
items.a: Software updates, new features, maintenance and support per the agreed SLA. You don't pay for hosting — Nalu AI runs on your own infrastructure.
Yes — both up and down. As you grow (e.g. from 450 to 700 SKUs), you switch to Growth without friction. We usually spot it automatically and reach out with a proposal.

items.q: Is there a minimum contract term?
items.a: 12 months is recommended — implementation barely amortizes for shorter terms. We offer attractive terms at 12 or 24 months. Monthly contracts are possible at list price.

items.q: What does a data warehouse build cost?
items.a: If you don't have a consolidated data foundation yet, we build it before the Nalu AI rollout. From €15,000 for a single source, from €35,000 for multiple. Talk to us.
We offer a 30-day pilot at reduced terms — with real data, real model, real results. No blind purchase.

finalCta.title: Let's talk about your project.
finalCta.subtitle: 30 minutes. Free. Not a sales pitch — we listen first.
finalCta.note: Typical response time: < 24 hours · No proposal without your consent
